considerations: pair high-fiber carbohydrates with protein and unsaturated fat; individual glucose response varies
example_foods: oats with nuts, Greek yogurt, eggs with vegetables, lentil dosa

considerations: emphasize fruits, vegetables, legumes, low-fat dairy, and lower-sodium choices
example_foods: beans, spinach, bananas, yogurt, unsalted nuts

considerations: include varied protein sources and monitor iron, vitamin B12, and omega-3 intake when relevant
example_foods: lentils, tofu, paneer, chickpeas, soy milk

considerations: prioritize satiety, protein, fiber, sleep, and sustainable activity
example_foods: vegetables, legumes, lean proteins, fruit, whole grains

considerations: smaller meals and avoiding late high-fat or trigger meals may reduce symptoms
example_foods: oatmeal, bananas, non-spicy dal, lean proteins
